title: secretx-core: add URI parsing utility
description: Every backend must parse secretx:// URIs consistently. Add a shared Uri type or parse_uri() function inside secretx-core (pub, not a separate crate — all backends already depend on secretx-core). Required fields: scheme (the part after secretx://), path segments, and a query-param map. Backends should call this rather than rolling their own string splitting. Without this, URI parsing will diverge across 13 backend crates. This should land as part of the secretx-core epic or as its own small addition before any backend work begins.
